name: Frank Gifford
abstract: Francis Newton Gifford (August 16, 1930 – August 9, 2015) was an American professional football player, actor, and television sports commentator. After a 12-year playing career as a halfback, flanker and safety for the New York Giants of the National Football League (NFL), he was a play-by-play announcer and commentator for 27 years on A…

concerts.label: The New York Pops Fifth Birthday Gala Celebration
